query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO knowledge_scenarios (scenarioId, domain, title, summary, content, geography, sector, tags)
VALUES (
  'D1-075',
  'deal_screening',
  'Al Rawabi Specialty Chemicals',
  'Type: PE Buyout. Sector: Energy Services. Revenue: KWD 8,400,000. IC: Proceed to due diligence.',
  '{"scenario_id":"D1-075","company_name":"Al Rawabi Specialty Chemicals","sector":"Energy Services","deal_type":"PE Buyout","geography":"Kuwait","executive_summary":"Al Rawabi Specialty Chemicals is a Kuwait-based manufacturer and distributor of specialty chemicals for the oil and gas, water treatment, and industrial cleaning markets. The company produces 28 chemical formulations under its own brand and distributes 14 imported specialty chemical product lines under exclusive agency agreements. KOC, KNPC, and MEW are the primary customers. The founder is 69 and seeks full exit. The manufacturing facility in Mina Abdullah is leasehold with 12 years remaining.","key_financials":{"revenue_kwd":8400000,"ebitda_kwd":1512000,"ebitda_margin_pct":18,"asking_multiple_x":7.5,"implied_ev_kwd":11340000},"investment_thesis":["KOC and KNPC approved vendor status for specialty chemical supply took 6 years to achieve — new market entrants face the same timeline, creating a structural competitive moat","28 proprietary chemical formulations represent defensible IP — Kuwait Municipality environmental clearance for chemical manufacturing took 3 years and is not easily replicated","14 exclusive import agency agreements provide distributable product margin of 22–28% on top of manufacturing revenue, creating a diversified revenue profile with different risk characteristics"],"key_risks":["Chemical manufacturing is subject to MEW and Kuwait Municipality environmental inspection — any compliance finding requiring plant shutdown would halt both manufacturing and distribution operations","Founder holds all KOC procurement relationships personally — key-man risk is the dominant concern; structured 18-month transition with formal relationship transfer milestones is essential","Raw material import dependency: 68% of chemical inputs are imported from Europe and Asia — shipping disruption and foreign exchange costs are structurally embedded risks"],"ic_recommendation":"Proceed to due diligence","analyst_name":"Hamad Al Ajmi","date":"2022-12-07"}',
  'Kuwait',
  'Energy Services',
  'PE Buyout,Energy Services,Kuwait,Proceed to due diligence'
);
